name: Chaos Mirage Dragon
name_jp: カオス・ミラージュ・ドラゴン
desc: You can target 1 banished LIGHT or DARK monster; Special Summon it to your field, but negate its effects, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except LIGHT or DARK Synchro Monsters. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of other monsters used for the Synchro Summon; banish them. You can only use each effect of "Chaos Mirage Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 banished LIGHT or DARK monster; Special Summon it to your field, but negate its effects, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except LIGHT or DARK Synchro Monsters. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of other monsters used for the Synchro Summon; banish them. You can only use each effect of "Chaos Mirage Dragon" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 banished LIGHT or DARK monster; Special Summon it to your field, but negate its effects, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except LIGHT or DARK Synchro Monsters. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of other monsters used for the Synchro Summon; banish them. You can only use each effect of "Chaos Mirage Dragon" once per turn.

action: Activates if used as Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
